vllm-serve.template:
Deploy an OpenAI-compatible vLLM inference server on Modal using the example at 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_inference.py.

1. Read 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_inference.py and check the MODEL_NAME, N_GPU, and GPU config.
2. If $ARGUMENTS is provided, use it as the model name override.
3. Run: modal deploy 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_inference.py
4. Print the resulting URL with /docs route for testing.

vllm-batch.template:
Run a batch vLLM throughput job on Modal using 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_throughput.py.

1. Read the script to understand defaults.
2. Run: modal run --detach 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_throughput.py $ARGUMENTS
3. Expected performance: ~30k tok/s input, ~2k tok/s output on H100.

vllm-low-latency.template:
Deploy a low-latency vLLM server with GPU memory snapshots using 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_low_latency.py.

1. Read the script to understand the setup.
2. If $ARGUMENTS is provided, use as GPU type override (e.g. H100, H200).
3. Run: modal deploy 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/vllm_low_latency.py
4. Print URL. Server uses sticky routing via Modal-Session-ID header.

opencode-serve.description: Launch OpenCode coding agent on Modal
opencode-serve.template:
Launch an OpenCode agent in a Modal Sandbox using 13_sandboxes/opencode_server.py.

1. Ensure opencode-secret exists (modal secret create opencode-secret OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD=...)
2. Run: uv run --with modal python 13_sandboxes/opencode_server.py --timeout 12h --password-secret opencode-secret $ARGUMENTS
3. Print the WebUI URL and password retrieval instructions.

ollama-llama.description: Deploy Ollama with Llama 3.3 70B on A100
ollama-llama.template:
Deploy Ollama with a large Llama model on Modal using 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/ollama_llama.py.

1. Read the file to check MODEL_NAME.
2. If $ARGUMENTS is provided, use as model name override.
3. Run: modal deploy 06_gpu_and_ml/llm-serving/ollama_llama.py
4. Print the URL. API at /v1/chat/completions (OpenAI-compatible).
